title: 凉城的博客
subTitle: 岂能尽如人意 但求无愧我心
bottomText: Copyright © 2025 凉城的博客 • Powered by Gmeek
indexScript: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { var hitokotoUrl = 'https://v1.hitokoto.cn/?c=i'; var footerSelectors = ['.footer-inner', 'footer', '.site-footer', '.footer']; var footerElem = null; for (var i = 0; i < footerSelectors.length; i++) { var elem = document.querySelector(footerSelectors[i]); if (elem) { footerElem = elem; break; } } if (footerElem) { fetch(hitokotoUrl).then(function(response) { return response.json(); }).then(function(data) { var hitokotoText = data.hitokoto + ' —— ' + data.from; var hitokotoDiv = document.createElement('div'); hitokotoDiv.style.marginBottom = '8px'; hitokotoDiv.style.fontStyle = 'italic'; hitokotoDiv.textContent = hitokotoText; footerElem.insertBefore(hitokotoDiv, footerElem.firstChild); }).catch(function(error) { console.error('获取一言失败:', error); }); } });</script>
